title: Simple Wave Lines Pattern Coloring Page

funFacts: Coloring repetitive lines acts as a form of meditation, lowering heart rates and encouraging focus.

Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
